channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network AnimEigo Schedules Alien Nine 动画 Blu-ray Disc June 9
item.description: ― AnimEigo announced on Monday that its physical Blu-ray Disc release of the original video anime adaptation of Hitoshi Tomizawa Alien Nine manga will ship on June 9. The release will feature an... | 来源: ANN | 原文: AnimEigo Schedules Alien Nine Anime Blu-ray Disc for June 9

item.description: Saya Fukase directs season 2 at IMAGICA Infos / Imageworks Studio, replacing 1st season director Chisaki ― Animation ID announced on Tuesday that the light anime adaptation of SORAJIMA and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'With Vengeance, Sincerely, Your Broken Saintess' Light Anime Gets 2nd Season in October

item.title: [动画][剧场版][STAFF][开播][公开] Anime News Network 新作 Votoms 动画 公开 Main 制作阵容, 2-Film Rollout 1st 开播 on November 20
